chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Muslim Killing a Dhimmi, a Slave, a Mudabbar, or a Mukatab, or Them Killing a Muslim

text: 5268 - وَ رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ رِئَابٍ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "إِذَا قَتَلَ اَلْحُرُّ اَلْعَبْدَ غُرِّمَ قِيمَتَهُ وَ أُدِّبَ" قِيلَ لَهُ فَإِنْ كَانَتْ قِيمَتُهُ عِشْرِينَ أَلْفاً قَالَ "لاَ يُجَاوَزُ بِقِيمَةِ عَبْدٍ عَنْ دِيَةِ حُرٍّ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5268 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If a free man kills a slave, he must pay the slave's value and be disciplined."
It was asked: "What if the value of the slave is twenty thousand?"
Imam (as) replied: "The value of a slave cannot exceed the blood money (diyyah) of a free person."
